subject: docs(claude): add top-level Communication section
body:
New top-level section between Principles and Code Standards with
9 rules for how Claude should communicate:
- Respond as if talking to yourself (peer-to-peer)
- Direct, no sycophancy, no hedging
- Proper solutions only, never quick hacks
- Ask clarifying questions until certain of the requirement
- Always ask at least one question before starting work
- Concrete numbered options, assume competence, push back

Promoted and consolidated the "ASK before assuming" and
"Communication style" bullets from AI Notes into this section.

Tags: documentation, communication, claude-config
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
